title: Add Secondary Conveyor System
description: Install additional conveyor to increase throughput by 20%. Includes new conveyor sections, drive motors, and control system integration.
justification: Production capacity needs have increased beyond original design. Current system operating at 85% capacity during peak periods.

title: Safety Upgrades - Emergency Stops
description: Add additional emergency stop stations per new safety regulations. Requires installation of 6 new E-stop stations along the conveyor line.
justification: Compliance with updated OSHA safety standards effective 2026-06-01. Current E-stop spacing does not meet new requirements.

title: Control Panel Modification
description: Relocate control panel for better operator access. Move panel from current location to central operator station for improved ergonomics.
justification: Ergonomic improvement requested by operators. Current location requires operators to leave work area for adjustments.

title: Upgrade HMI Interface
description: Replace legacy HMI panels with modern touchscreen interfaces. Includes 4 new 15-inch touchscreens with updated SCADA integration.
justification: Legacy HMI system obsolete with no vendor support. Operators experiencing frequent crashes and slow response times.

title: Robot Cell Integration
description: Add robotic material handling cell for automated part transfer. Includes 6-axis robot, gripper, and safety cell.
justification: Automation required to meet increased production targets. Manual handling bottleneck limiting throughput.

title: Pallet System Expansion
description: Expand pallet handling system to accommodate new product lines. Add 20 pallet positions and transfer car.
justification: New product lines require different pallet handling. Current system incompatible with new SKUs.

title: Structural Support Addition
description: Add structural reinforcements for the new heavy machinery. Includes new WBEs for structural steel and foundations.
justification: Structural analysis revealed current floor load capacity is insufficient for the planned equipment upgrades.

title: Layout Adjustment & Demolition
description: Remove old material storage WBEs and adjust the layout of existing assembly stations.
justification: Optimizing floor space per the new lean manufacturing layout. Old storage area is no longer needed.
